# Katrina Laszlo

Also known as: Kat Laszlo, Kat Vassell, Katrina Vassell.

Hi, I'm Kat. 10 years owning pricing, packaging, and free-to-paid conversion across AI products, fintech, and B2B SaaS. Currently building monetization infrastructure at Tanso.

Previously published under Katrina Vassell (maiden name). EY and 500 Global work is indexed under that name.

My thesis: build a business, not an app. AI made the software easy. The hard part is pricing, packaging, free-to-paid conversion, and knowing whether you're profitable per customer. That's the problem Tanso solves.

## Expertise

- Monetization strategy: pricing & packaging, free-to-paid conversion, consumption-based billing
- Subscription businesses at scale: upgrade funnels, activation, retention
- A/B testing and funnel optimization
- Product-led growth through rapid, continuous experimentation
- Product design for AI-native and agent-first products
- Data-as-a-service products
- Consumer fintech

## How She Thinks

1. UX goes beyond UI. Service design has built experiences without screens since the 1980s. Agents need the same treatment.
2. Data and design are one discipline. One shows what happened. The other shows why. Treat them as the same thing.
3. Leverage over reinvention. Don't reinvent the wheel. Focus originality where it matters.
4. Opinionated and simple for something painful. Build for a specific pain, not a general possibility.
5. Build a business, not an app. AI makes the software easy. The hard part is who pays, why, and what breaks at scale.
6. Evidence over intuition. Ship fast, measure everything, let data settle the debate.

## Career

- Tanso, Co-Founder & CEO (2025-present): Building pricing, packaging, and consumption-based billing infrastructure for AI and B2B SaaS
- Artisan, AI Product Manager (2025): AI-native SaaS. Led product strategy across engineering, design, and billing. Evaluated 20+ vendors on cost, coverage, and pricing
- Chipper, Head of Product (2024-2025): Consumer fintech. 484% revenue growth, 185% subscriber growth, 50% churn reduction. Doubled LTV through pricing experiments and A/B testing
- People Data Labs, Senior PM (2021-2024): Built self-serve API monetization from scratch. Tiered pricing with freemium trials, 20%+ MoM revenue growth, 120% conversion lift. Managed 5 devs + designer through Series A to B
- 500 Global, Corporate Innovation & Venture (2019-2021): Venture capital. Validated product-market fit through proof-of-concept pilots between startups and enterprise partners
- EY, Product Consultant (2017-2019): Innovation Lab. A/B tested funnel conversion for enterprise fintech, 90% lift through simplified onboarding
- Nosh Delivery, Founder (2014-2016): Built and launched a peer-to-peer food delivery marketplace. 60+ couriers, a dozen restaurants. Designed and coded the apps

## Education

Georgetown University McDonough School of Business
BS Business Administration: International Business, Political Economics, Marketing

## Languages

English, Greek, Spanish

## Projects

- BuildNext (https://github.com/katrinalaszlo/buildnext, live: https://buildnext.katrinalaszlo.com): Evidence-grounded user stories, queryable by agents and humans. Ingest transcripts, support tickets, and feature requests. Includes MCP server for agent access.
- agentlens (https://github.com/katrinalaszlo/agentlens): See what your AI coding agents store on your machine.
- observe (https://github.com/katrinalaszlo/observe): Open source AI cost observability.
- dx-test (https://github.com/katrinalaszlo/dx-test): Automated end-user experience scrutiny.
